name: Document + Conditional + Human Approval
description: Plan-to-commands evaluation captured from production log on 2026-04-30 at 15:50:14.
user_prompt:
Convert this workflow plan to JSON commands:

1. Add a Document node named "Upload Expense PDF" as the first node.
   - Purpose: Prompt the user to upload an expense report PDF and extract the raw text for downstream processing.
   - Configuration:
     - Input mode: manual document upload at runtime
     - Expected document type: PDF expense report
     - Save output to variable: true
     - Output variable: expense_document_text
     - Use reasonable default document extraction settings for OCR/text extraction

2. Add an AI Extract node named "Extract Expense Total" connected from the Document node.
   - Purpose: Extract the expense total from the uploaded expense PDF text.
   - Configuration:
     - Input source: ${expense_document_text}
     - Save output to variable: true
     - Output variable: expense_data
     - Field schema:
       - total_amount
         - type: number
         - description: Total expense amount from the expense report PDF. Extract the final total amount due/reimbursable as a numeric value without currency symbols or commas.
     - Use reasonable default confidence/extraction settings

3. Add a Conditional node named "Check If Total Exceeds Approval Threshold" connected from the AI Extract node.
   - Purpose: Route large expenses for manager approval and smaller expenses for automatic approval.
   - Configuration:
     - conditionType: comparison
     - leftValue: ${expense_data.total_amount}
     - operator: greater than
     - rightValue: 5000
   - Routing:
     - pass path = total_amount is greater than 5000
     - fail path = total_amount is less than or equal to 5000

4. On the Conditional pass path, add a Human Approval node named "Manager Signoff".
   - Purpose: Request manager approval for high-value expense reports.
   - Configuration:
     - Assign to user ID 1
     - Title: Manager Approval Required - Expense Report
     - Description: Please review this expense report because the extracted total exceeds the approval threshold of 5000.
     - Display data:
       - Extracted total amount: ${expense_data.total_amount}
       - Extracted document text: ${expense_document_text}
     - Use reasonable default timeout and approval settings
   - This uses validated user ID 1 (Joe Smith)

5. On the Conditional fail path, add an AI Action node named "Auto Approve Expense".
   - Purpose: Automatically approve lower-value expense reports.
   - Configuration:
     - Use AI agent ID 372
     - Prompt: Auto-approve this expense report because the extracted total amount is 5000 or less. Return a concise approval decision summary including the total amount and state that the expense report is approved.

Expense total amount: ${expense_data.total_amount}
     - Save output to variable: true
     - Output variable: auto_approval_result
   - This uses AI agent ID 372 (Agent 372)

6. On the Human Approval approved/pass path, add a Set Variable node named "Set Approved Email Content".
   - Purpose: Create simple variables for the Alert node subject and message.
   - Configuration:
     - Set variable approved_email_subject = Expense report approved
     - Set variable approved_email_message using expression mode = f"Your expense report for total amount {expense_data['total_amount']} has been approved."

7. On the Human Approval rejected/fail path, add a Set Variable node named "Set Rejected Email Content".
   - Purpose: Create simple variables for the Alert node subject and message.
   - Configuration:
     - Set variable rejected_email_subject = Expense report not approved
     - Set variable rejected_email_message using expression mode = f"Your expense report for total amount {expense_data['total_amount']} was not approved during manager signoff."

8. After the AI Action node on the low-value branch, add a Set Variable node named "Set Auto-Approved Email Content".
   - Purpose: Create simple variables for the Alert node subject and message.
   - Configuration:
     - Set variable auto_email_subject = Expense report auto-approved
     - Set variable auto_email_message using expression mode = f"Your expense report for total amount {expense_data['total_amount']} has been auto-approved. {auto_approval_result}"

9. Add an Alert node named "Email Submitter Approved" connected from the "Set Approved Email Content" node.
   - Purpose: Notify the submitter that the manager-approved expense report is approved.
   - Configuration:
     - Alert type: Email
     - To: submitter@acme.com
     - emailSubject: ${approved_email_subject}
     - messageTemplate: ${approved_email_message}

10. Add an Alert node named "Email Submitter Rejected" connected from the "Set Rejected Email Content" node.
    - Purpose: Notify the submitter that the manager review did not approve the expense report.
    - Configuration:
      - Alert type: Email
      - To: submitter@acme.com
      - emailSubject: ${rejected_email_subject}
      - messageTemplate: ${rejected_email_message}

11. Add an Alert node named "Email Submitter Auto-Approved" connected from the "Set Auto-Approved Email Content" node.
    - Purpose: Notify the submitter that the expense report was auto-approved.
    - Configuration:
      - Alert type: Email
      - To: submitter@acme.com
      - emailSubject: ${auto_email_subject}
      - messageTemplate: ${auto_email_message}

12. Connections summary:
    - Upload Expense PDF -> Extract Expense Total
    - Extract Expense Total -> Check If Total Exceeds Approval Threshold
    - Check If Total Exceeds Approval Threshold pass -> Manager Signoff
    - Check If Total Exceeds Approval Threshold fail -> Auto Approve Expense
    - Manager Signoff pass -> Set Approved Email Content
    - Manager Signoff fail -> Set Rejected Email Content
    - Auto Approve Expense -> Set Auto-Approved Email Content
    - Set Approved Email Content -> Email Submitter Approved
    - Set Rejected Email Content -> Email Submitter Rejected
    - Set Auto-Approved Email Content -> Email Submitter Auto-Approved

13. Notes:
    - This workflow is manually triggered when a user uploads an expense PDF.
    - Reasonable defaults should be used for any unspecified node settings.
    - The human approval reviewer is user ID 1 (Joe Smith).
    - The AI Action node uses AI agent ID 372.
